SLP MEDIA — AI System
Full Stack AI Operating System

Your Business Runs Itself

Every agent, every tool, every automation — mapped out. You handle sales calls and client calls. Everything else is automated.

🤖 Jarvis — The Ops Agent
The central intelligence. You message it on WhatsApp. It reads your request, decides which agent to trigger, and takes action. The single control layer over everything below.
Claude API n8n WhatsApp Business API GHL API Meta API
Lead Generation
🎯
AGENT 01
The Prospector
Runs: Daily on schedule or on-demand
Output: Qualified leads pushed into GHL pipeline
Clay Apify Google Maps API n8n GHL API
📧
AGENT 02
The Outbound Agent
Runs: Continuously, 50–200 emails/day
Output: Warm replies routed into GHL automatically
Instantly.ai Clay Claude API n8n
🔍
AGENT 03
The Qualifier
Runs: On funnel submission (instant)
Output: Contact created in GHL with lead score + tags
Funnel webhook GHL API n8n Claude API
Booking & Sales
📅
AGENT 04
The Setter
Runs: 5-day follow-up from first contact
Output: Booked call or moved to nurture
GHL Workflows Conversation AI Calendly API
🎙️
AGENT 05
Call Prep Agent
Runs: 30 mins before every booked call
Output: 1-page brief with research + pitch angle
Claude API Apify Meta Ad Library n8n
📋
AGENT 06
Proposal Agent
Runs: On lead qualification (high score)
Output: Custom branded proposal sent to lead
Claude API PandaDoc API GHL API n8n
Client Ops & Delivery
⚡
AGENT 07
Account Builder
Runs: On new client intake form submission
Output: Full GHL sub-account live in 3 mins
GHL API GHL Snapshots n8n deploy-client.js
🎨
AGENT 08
Creative Director
Runs: On brief submission (new campaign)
Output: Creatives + copy + Meta campaign live
AdCreative.ai Creatify Claude API Meta Marketing API
📊
AGENT 09
Reporting Agent
Runs: 7am daily (you) + weekly (clients)
Output: Performance brief to WhatsApp + client emails
GHL API Meta API Claude API n8n
✍️
AGENT 10
Content Agent
Runs: Weekly per client
Output: 30 days of posts scheduled automatically
Claude API Buffer API Instagram API n8n
⭐
AGENT 11
Review Agent
Runs: 3 weeks after onboarding + monitors daily
Output: Review requests sent, responses drafted
GHL Workflows Google Business API Claude API
🔁
AGENT 12
Reactivation Agent
Runs: Every 90 days on cold/lost contacts
Output: Re-engaged leads re-enter booking sequence
GHL Workflows Claude API n8n
What Each Agent Actually Does
🎯
The Prospector
AGENT 01 — Lead Generation
You define your ideal client — industry, city, review count range, business size. The Prospector scrapes Google Maps and LinkedIn via Clay, finds every matching business, enriches each with email, phone, and website, checks for duplicates against your existing GHL contacts, then pushes net-new leads directly into your prospecting pipeline. Runs on a daily schedule or whenever you message Jarvis "find me 50 plumbers in Manchester."
ClayApifyGoogle Maps APIn8nGHL API
📧
The Outbound Agent
AGENT 02 — Cold Outreach
Takes the Prospector's leads and enters them into cold email sequences via Instantly.ai. Sends 50–200 emails per day from a warmed sending domain. When someone replies, n8n intercepts the reply, Claude reads it and classifies it as interested / not interested / question. Interested replies get moved to GHL and Claude sends an intelligent first response. You only see the people who want to talk.
Instantly.aiClayClaude APIn8n
🎨
The Creative Director
AGENT 08 — Ad Production
You or a client submits a brief: offer, target audience, budget, tone. Claude writes 5 ad copy variants with hooks, primary text, and CTAs. AdCreative.ai generates 10–20 visual variants. n8n sends you a WhatsApp with preview links. You approve with one tap. n8n then calls the Meta Marketing API to create the campaign, ad sets, targeting, upload creatives, attach copy, and set budget. Campaign is live without you opening Ads Manager once.
Claude APIAdCreative.aiCreatifyMeta Marketing APIn8n
📊
Morning Report Agent
AGENT 09 — Intelligence
Every morning at 7am, pulls data from GHL (new leads, pipeline movement, calls booked, revenue closed), Meta Ads (spend, CPL, ROAS per client), and Google Ads. Claude writes a 10-line business brief — what happened, what needs attention, what's performing. Delivered to your WhatsApp before you're out of bed. Separate weekly reports auto-emailed to each client with their numbers.
GHL APIMeta APIGoogle Ads APIClaude APIn8nWhatsApp API
How a Lead Moves Through the System
Discovery
Prospector scrapes Google Maps
Clay finds 50 matching businesses in target area
Enrichment
Email, phone, website, review count added
Dedup check
Removes anyone already in GHL
↓
Outreach
Cold email sequence starts
Instantly.ai — 3 touch sequence over 7 days
Reply detection
n8n catches replies, Claude classifies intent
↓
Qualification
Warm reply → sent to funnel
Link to qualifying funnel in reply
Funnel completed
8 qualifying answers + lead score 0–100
GHL contact created
All answers mapped to custom fields + tags
↓
Follow-Up
Setter agent activates
SMS + email sequence referencing their answers
Call booked via Calendly
GHL pipeline moves to "Call Booked"
Show-Up reminders fire
24hr + 1hr before, confirmation sent
↓
Sales Call
👤 You take the call
30 mins before: prep brief auto-sent to your WhatsApp
Call recorded + transcribed
Action items extracted, follow-up drafted by Claude
↓
Close
Deal marked Won
Triggers contract via PandaDoc automatically
Payment created
Stripe subscription created on contract sign
Account Builder fires
GHL sub-account created, funnel deployed
↓
Delivery
Creative Director launches ads
Campaigns live within 24hrs of onboarding
Content Agent runs weekly
Posts scheduled for 30 days
Reporting Agent sends weekly
Client gets auto performance report every Monday
Full Tech Stack
⚙️n8n£20/mo
The orchestration engine. Connects every tool, runs on a schedule, handles webhooks, triggers agents. The most important tool in the stack — learn this first.
Used by: Every single agent
🧠Claude API~£40/mo
The intelligence layer. Writes copy, reads data, makes decisions, handles conversations, writes reports, classifies replies. The brain behind every agent.
Used by: Outbound, Qualifier, Proposal, Reporting, Content, Call Prep, Jarvis
🏗️GoHighLevel APIIncluded in plan
Full programmatic control of your GHL. Create sub-accounts, load snapshots, manage contacts, move pipeline stages, trigger workflows — all without touching the UI.
Used by: Account Builder, Qualifier, Setter, Reactivation, Reporting
🔍Clay£149/mo
Finds and enriches leads. Scrapes Google Maps, LinkedIn, Apollo. Returns email, phone, company info, review count. Feeds directly into the outbound sequence.
Used by: Prospector, Outbound
📧Instantly.ai£37/mo
Cold email infrastructure at scale. Separate sending domain so your main domain stays clean. Handles sending limits, warm-up, reply detection.
Used by: Outbound Agent
🎨AdCreative.ai£149/mo
Generates ad creatives scored by predicted performance. Feed it brand colours and offer, get back 20 visual variants in minutes. Has an API for automation.
Used by: Creative Director
🎬Creatify£99/mo
AI video ads with avatars that look like real UGC content. Script goes in, video ad comes out. Huge performance boost for clients running video campaigns.
Used by: Creative Director
📱Meta Marketing APIFree
Programmatic control of Meta Ads Manager. Create campaigns, ad sets, upload creatives, set budgets and targeting — without touching the dashboard.
Used by: Creative Director
💬WhatsApp Business API~£10/mo
Your interface to the whole system. Receive morning reports, approve campaigns, message Jarvis with commands. The front-end of your AI operating system.
Used by: Jarvis, Reporting, Call Prep, Creative Director
🕷️Apify£49/mo
Custom web scraping for anything Clay can't handle. Google Maps, Facebook Ads Library, competitor websites, Trustpilot reviews, Instagram profiles.
Used by: Prospector, Call Prep, Competitor Monitor
📄PandaDoc API£25/mo
Auto-generates and sends contracts when a deal closes. Tracks when signed, triggers payment creation. Replaces all manual contract admin.
Used by: Close automation
💳Stripe / GoCardless% of revenue
Payment and subscriptions. Triggered automatically when contract is signed. Handles recurring billing, failed payment retries, and overdue notifications.
Used by: Payment automation
Total monthly stack cost (fully built)
Excluding ad spend and GHL plan
~£578/mo
Less than a part-time employee's weekly wage
Build Plan — What to Do Each Month
Month 1
Set up n8n + connect GHL API
Sign up to n8n Cloud. Add GHL API key. Build one test workflow to confirm everything talks. Takes an afternoon.
Build the Morning Report Agent
Your first real agent. n8n + GHL API + Claude + WhatsApp. You'll use this every day — teaches you the full stack in one build.
Connect the funnel webhook to GHL
Already coded — just drop your GHL webhook URL into funnel.html CLIENT_CONFIG and you're live.
Month 2
Build the Prospector Agent
Sign up for Clay. Define your ICP. Build n8n workflow: Clay → dedup → push to GHL. You now have automated lead generation.
Launch cold outreach with Instantly.ai
Set up a sending domain, warm it for 2 weeks, then connect to Prospector output. 50 emails/day to start.
Build the Account Builder Agent
Map your GHL onboarding steps. Build n8n workflow triggered by intake form. New client = 3-minute setup.
Month 3
Build the Creative Director Agent
Get Meta Developer App approved for ads_management. Connect AdCreative.ai. Build campaign creation workflow. Test with one client.
Build the Call Prep Agent
n8n watches GHL for calls booked. 30 mins before, Apify scrapes the prospect's web presence. Claude writes the brief. Hits your WhatsApp.
Create GHL snapshot v1
Once your GHL is fully set up and tested, snapshot it. First client deployment from snapshot to confirm it works.
Month 4
Build Jarvis — the Ops Agent
Connect WhatsApp Business API to n8n. Claude reads every message you send, identifies intent, triggers the right agent. This is the final layer.
Add Proposal + Contract automation
PandaDoc + Stripe. Deal closes → proposal sent → contract signed → payment created. Zero admin from you.
Build 3 snapshot variants
Trades, Professional Services, E-commerce. Three versions of the same system with different copy and targeting built in.
Month 5+
Client reporting automation
Auto-emailed performance reports every Monday to every client. No manual reporting ever again.
Content Agent for clients
Claude generates monthly content calendars. Buffer API schedules posts. Clients get social media on autopilot.
Package and sell the system
By this point you have a proven, running system. You package it as a product and sell it to other agencies or businesses.
